sections.paragraph:
δοκιμασία n (dokima^si h_hs stem_acc fem)


Etym. δοκιμάζω

an assay, examination, scrutiny:

1. of magistrates, to see if they fulfil the legal requirements, Plat., etc.

2. δ. τῶν ἐφήβων, before admission to the rights of manhood, Dem.

3. δ. τῶν ρητόρων, a process to determine the right to speak in the ἐκκλησία or law-courts, Aeschin.
